summary: Iteration 5: Reviews Management Testing - 12/12 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed. CRUD operations for reviews working correctly, /reviews page shows API data, homepage carousel displays featured reviews, Admin CMS has Reviews tab with ReviewEditor form.

issues: Page title not updating via Helmet (shows generic 'Appliance Repair San Francisco...' instead of 'Customer Reviews | FixitBay...') - low priority, SEO meta tags likely still correct in source

seed_data_creation: 10 reviews already seeded in MongoDB (g-1 to g-5 Google, t-1 to t-5 Thumbtack)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews CRUD is fully working. All 10 seeded reviews display correctly on /reviews page and homepage carousel. Admin CMS at /admin/cms has 'Отзывы' tab with full CRUD functionality. data-testid attributes: tab-reviews, add-review-btn, review-source-select, review-author-input, review-text-input, review-featured-checkbox, review-save-btn, cms-review-{id}. Frontend pages use useReviews hook to fetch from /api/cms/reviews (all) or /api/cms/reviews/featured (featured only).

frontend_ui_tests.Homepage carousel displays reviews from: PASS - Shows Gayle Rabbitt, Emily Chen
